# ZyncSpace Website Documentation

> AI-driven technology consulting and unified team workspace platform.

## Overview
ZyncSpace combines AI-driven technology consulting with a unified team workspace — chat, tasks, calendar, and AI in one platform. The site covers consulting services, product features, pricing, blog content, and contact information.

## Main Pages

### Home
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/
- Description: Landing page for AI consulting, capabilities, framework, tech stack, industries, case studies, pricing, and product showcase.

### Consulting Services
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services
- Description: Technology consulting capabilities — AI automation, cloud engineering, UX, and custom SaaS builds.

### Our Framework
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services/framework
- Description: ZyncSpace consulting delivery framework and methodology.

### Technology Stack
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services/technology
- Description: Engineering toolchain and technologies used for client delivery.

### Industries
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services/industries
- Description: Industry-specific consulting solutions.

### Case Studies
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services/case-studies
- Description: Client outcomes and consulting case studies.

### Consulting Pricing
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/services/pricing
- Description: Consulting engagement models and pricing tiers.

### Features
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/features
- Description: ZyncSpace product features — chat, tasks, calendar, and AI workspace.

### Use Cases
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/use-cases
- Description: How teams use ZyncSpace for collaboration and productivity.

### Pricing
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/pricing
- Description: ZyncSpace product pricing plans.

### About Us
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/about
- Description: ZyncSpace mission and team.

### Careers
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/careers
- Description: Open roles and company culture.

### Contact
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/contact
- Description: Consulting, support, and partnership inquiries.

### Blog
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/blogs
- Description: Articles on team communication, productivity, AI, and workplace collaboration.

### Terms of Service
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/terms-of-service

### Privacy Policy
- URL: https://zyncspace.com/privacy-policy

## Machine-Readable Feeds
- Sitemap: https://zyncspace.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://zyncspace.com/feed.xml
- Robots: https://zyncspace.com/robots.txt
